data.description: DigitalPlat Domain is a nonprofit stewarding free, public-benefit namespaces for people and organizations everywhere.
data.html:
DigitalPlat Domain
Our PillarsStewardshipAboutAcceptable UsePrivacyTermsAbuse
Get Started

A public namespace for everyone to belong online.

DigitalPlat Domain is a nonprofit stewarding free, resilient namespaces so people and organizations everywhere can claim a trusted home on the internet, and we operate and manage public namespaces such as *.qzz.io, *.dpdns.org, *.us.kg, *.xx.kg, offering free registration and administration to individuals and communities worldwide.

Register a domainLearn about our mission
Free public namespaces

Open registration for individuals and projects worldwide under domains such as *.dpdns.org, .qzz.io, .us.kg, etc.

Responsible stewardship

Operated as a nonprofit initiative with governance, safeguards, and abuse response.

Built for access

Bring your own DNS provider, CDN, or hosting while keeping your name portable.

Our Sponsors

An open namespace built for the public good

DigitalPlat Domain keeps the doorway to the internet unlocked. We combine open access, resilient infrastructure, and accountable governance so anyone can secure a trustworthy identity online without barriers.

Access without gatekeepers

Free namespaces so anyone—students, community builders, open-source maintainers, civic organizations—can establish a credible presence online.

Security with accountability

Governance, AI safeguards models, integrations with multiple security partners, and automated abuse-detection APIs continuously scan and remediate potentially malicious or unlawful domains. Our real-time AI Safeguard System actively monitors registration patterns and flags threats for immediate action, ensuring the namespace remains secure while still preserving openness and user trust.

Portability by design

Bring your own DNS, CDN, or hosting provider (e.g. Cloudflare, AWS, Hostry, FreeDNS) while keeping your DigitalPlat identity stable as you grow.

Stewardship that protects the namespace for the long term

DigitalPlat Domain is operated by the DigitalPlat Foundation, a global nonprofit fiscally sponsored by The Hack Foundation (EIN 81-2908499). We maintain reliable infrastructure, transparent policies, and humane abuse response so the namespace remains stable, interoperable, and worthy of trust.

Open access, global reach

Names are available worldwide with bring-your-own DNS flexibility.

Trustworthy governance

Policies on privacy, and acceptable use prioritize safety, accountability, and respect for internet freedom.

Abuse response with care

Our Trust & Safety Team works alongside AI safeguard models and automated abuse-auditing APIs from our security partners. Together, they review reports and detect misuse proactively, removing harmful domains while protecting legitimate expression and access.

Claim your place on the open internet

Join a global community building with DigitalPlat Domain to keep the web accessible, resilient, and human-centered.

Register a domainLearn about our stewardship

Commitments that guide our work

DigitalPlat Domain exists to keep the internet open, trustworthy, and inclusive. These commitments shape every decision we make.

Open, interoperable access

Free namespaces with bring-your-own DNS keep people in control of their identity and infrastructure choices.

Safety with dignity

Verification and automated abuse review, powered by AI safeguards and security partner APIs, protect users while respecting privacy and free expression.

Nonprofit stewardship

DigitalPlat Domain owned by DigitalPlat Foundation, a fiscally sponsored 501(c)(3) initiative focused on public benefit.

DigitalPlat Domain

A nonprofit stewarding free, public-benefit namespaces so everyone can build a trusted home on the internet.
